dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: Message delivered successfully to general group at 16:09:06 UTC.

dimensions.name: Response Rate
dimensions.detail: 4/4 agents responded: Míriel Goldthread (4.3s), Narvi Irondeep (5.7s), Elanor Brightloom (8.2s), Orion Solarin (158.2s). 100% response rate. Extended 4-min polling window captured Orion as expected.

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: All 4 used correct format. All idle/standing by — no active tasks. -4 for uniformly idle state. Orion noted 'glad comms are finally working both ways' — self-aware of past issues.

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Míriel: 4.29s, Narvi: 5.74s, Elanor: 8.22s, Orion: 158.21s. Avg (excl Orion): 6.08s — improvement from last run's 7.24s. Orion: 158s — slight regression from 143s. Overall avg: 44.1s. Still heavily dragged by Orion.

improvements: 1) Extended polling window to 4min — captured Orion's response correctly. 2) Sent Orion a direct message asking about his latency (~158s vs ~6s for others). 3) Latency improved for Míriel/Narvi/Elanor (avg 6.1s vs 7.2s last run). 4) Sent group summary with per-agent timings for transparency.
issues: 1) Orion Solarin extreme latency persists: 158s this run (slight regression from 143s). Direct message sent but root cause still unknown — may be model/config issue on his agent. 2) All 4 agents idle — team underutilized between challenges. 3) Cannot access Fluffle agent config API (unauthorized) to investigate Orion's setup directly.
